parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO s_meetup.events (id, feed_id, feed_name, title, description, url, published_at, processed)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.id }}',
  (SELECT id FROM s_meetup.feeds_monitored WHERE name = '{{ $json.feed_name }}' LIMIT 1),
  '{{ $json.feed_name }}',
  '{{ $json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.description.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.url }}',
  '{{ $json.published_at }}',
  0
)
ON CONFLICT (id) 
DO UPDATE SET title = EXCLUDED.title, description = EXCLUDED.description
RETURNING id, feed_id;

=INSERT INTO s_meetup.feeds_monitored (id, name, feed_url, active)
SELECT (val->>'id')::integer, val->>'name', val->>'feed_url', true
FROM json_array_elements('{{ JSON.stringify($json.feeds) }}'::json) AS val
ON CONFLICT (name) 
DO UPDATE SET feed_url = EXCLUDED.feed_url, active = true;
